properties.remark: THE KIFI TV-8 EVENING NEWS SHOWED VIDEO OF SHEET METAL TORN FROM A SHED NEAR THE TOWN OF REXBURG. SOME MODERATE SIZE BROKEN TREE LIMBS WERE ALSO IN THE VIDEO.
